author: Kaelbling, Littman & Moore (1996)
title: Reinforcement Learning: A Survey
why: Peta besar RL dalam satu survei, titik start paling enak buat pemula

author: Tesauro (1995)
title: Temporal Difference Learning and TD-Gammon
why: TD belajar main backgammon level dunia, kisah sukses RL yang legendaris

author: Samuel (1959)
title: Some Studies in Machine Learning Using the Game of Checkers
why: Cikal bakal RL: program checkers yang belajar sendiri sejak 1959

author: Robbins (1952)
title: Some Aspects of the Sequential Design of Experiments
why: Akar bandit, dilema eksplorasi vs eksploitasi mulai dari sini

author: Bellman (1954)
title: The Theory of Dynamic Programming
why: Pengantar santai dynamic programming langsung dari penciptanya

author: Bellman (1957)
title: A Markovian Decision Process
why: Kelahiran MDP + persamaan Bellman, fondasi semua RL

author: Thompson (1933)
title: On the Likelihood That One Unknown Probability Exceeds Another in View of the Evidence of Two Samples
why: Asal-usul Thompson sampling, ide Bayesian buat pilih aksi terbaik

author: Sutton (1988)
title: Learning to Predict by the Methods of Temporal Differences
why: Makalah TD asli: belajar prediksi dari selisih antar-waktu, wajib baca

author: Watkins & Dayan (1992)
title: Q-learning
why: Q-learning resmi + bukti konvergensinya, algoritma RL paling ikonik

author: Rummery & Niranjan (1994)
title: On-line Q-learning using connectionist systems
why: SARSA lahir di sini, versi on-policy dari Q-learning

author: Barto, Sutton & Anderson (1983)
title: Neuronlike adaptive elements that can solve difficult learning control problems
why: Actor-critic klasik lewat cerita nyeimbangin tiang (cart-pole)

author: Singh & Sutton (1996)
title: Reinforcement Learning with Replacing Eligibility Traces
why: Eligibility trace model 'replacing', bikin belajar lebih cepat & stabil

author: Peng & Williams (1996)
title: Incremental Multi-step Q-learning
why: Gabungin Q-learning sama TD(lambda) jadi Q(lambda), multi-langkah

author: Sutton (1990)
title: Integrated Architectures for Learning, Planning, and Reacting Based on Approximating Dynamic Programming
why: Dyna: campur belajar, planning, dan react dari DP aproksimasi

author: Moore & Atkeson (1993)
title: Prioritized Sweeping: Reinforcement Learning with Less Data and Less Time
why: Prioritas update state penting dulu, RL hemat data & waktu

author: Auer, Cesa-Bianchi & Fischer (2002)
title: Finite-time Analysis of the Multiarmed Bandit Problem
why: UCB1 & analisis regret finite-time bandit, dasar eksplorasi optimis

author: Lai & Robbins (1985)
title: Asymptotically Efficient Adaptive Allocation Rules
why: Batas bawah regret bandit yang legendaris, teori di balik UCB

author: Williams (1992)
title: Simple Statistical Gradient-Following Algorithms for Connectionist Reinforcement Learning
why: REINFORCE: gradien kebijakan paling dasar buat connectionist RL

author: Barto, Bradtke & Singh (1995)
title: Learning to Act Using Real-Time Dynamic Programming
why: Real-time DP: planning asinkron sambil jalan, jembatan DP-RL

author: Dayan (1992)
title: The Convergence of TD(lambda) for General lambda
why: Bukti TD(lambda) konvergen buat lambda umum, teori eligibility traces

author: Sutton, McAllester, Singh & Mansour (2000)
title: Policy Gradient Methods for Reinforcement Learning with Function Approximation
why: Teorema policy gradient + fungsi aproksimasi, fondasi metode PG modern

author: Chapelle & Li (2011)
title: An Empirical Evaluation of Thompson Sampling
why: Bukti empiris Thompson sampling ngalahin UCB, bikin TS naik daun lagi

author: Agrawal & Goyal (2012)
title: Analysis of Thompson Sampling for the Multi-armed Bandit Problem
why: Analisis regret pertama buat Thompson sampling, akhirnya ada teorinya

author: Jaakkola, Jordan & Singh (1994)
title: Convergence of Stochastic Iterative Dynamic Programming Algorithms
why: Kerangka umum kenapa Q-learning & TD konvergen, agak berat matematis

author: Tsitsiklis & Van Roy (1997)
title: An Analysis of Temporal-Difference Learning with Function Approximation
why: TD + aproksimasi linear: kapan konvergen, kapan meledak

author: Gittins (1979)
title: Bandit Processes and Dynamic Allocation Indices
why: Gittins index: solusi optimal bandit Bayesian, elegan tapi berat
